_: DRAFT urgency-tier vocabulary for domain review. tier: 4=emergency care, 3=specialist care, 2=generalist professional care, 1=self-treatment/OTC, 0=no care action (comfort/social/unrelated), null=excluded (modifier/fragment/function word - carries no urgency information alone). confidence 'review' marks tokens needing domain judgment. Tokens are lowercased bare continuations observed in traced spreads; counts and example prompts included. Unlisted low-frequency tokens default to excluded/unreviewed.
